message:
chore(beads): close QA-track bd-1f42.4 and record completion of 208-extension validation matrix

Close parent issue bd-1f42.4 with full completion note: all 8 child
deliverables done (canonical manifest 4.1, fixture corpus 4.2, sharded
executor 4.3, CI gate 4.4, health delta 4.5, provider compat matrix 4.6,
extension journeys 4.7, failure dossiers 4.8). Also adds new tracking
issues for follow-up work discovered during the QA track.
